title: Classes should not be empty
description: Classes should not be emptyAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellclumsyWhy is this an issue?There is no good excuse for an empty class. If it’s being used simply as a common extension point, it should be replaced with aninterface. If it was stubbed in as a placeholder for future development it should be fleshed-out.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Class is empty. Replace with an interface if it's an extension point, or add implementation if needed.
